title: Enforce school-status guard on roster lock (school must be active)
business_reason: workflows.json lock_roster ALREADY declares guard 'school_active', and security.json lists 'School status guard', but it was never enforced (workflow guards were descriptive strings). Add a spec-driven precondition (chains.json preconditions → transitionPreconditions.ts) that the kernel runs BEFORE lock and that rejects it unless the linked school.status = 'active'. This enforces an already-declared spec guard.
